title: Devil in the Womb 2: Deception
overview: Amelia returns to her old home with her adopted children, Alani and Vito, as she prepares for childbirth. Advised by Dr. Imam to transfer hospitals for safety, she agrees, but soon discovers a conspiracy between the doctor and the hospital. Alani, Vito, and Bara must fight to save Amelia and her baby from growing danger.
